pi_items.verified_value: Cycles (required for proper Shadow Catcher support)
pi_items.source: task.json description and verifier.py documentation confirm Cycles is required
setup_task.sh line 65 disables it initially; export_result.sh checks it; verifier.py awards 20 points for enabling it
setup_task.sh line 68 disables it initially; verifier.py awards 25 points for enabling it

privileged_info_summary: This VFX shadow catcher setup task uses the official Blender BMW27 demonstration file as its base data source (from https://download.blender.org/demo/test/BMW27.blend.zip). The task requires configuring a GroundPlane object as a shadow catcher in Blender's Cycles render engine with film transparency enabled. The starting scene is created synthetically by setup_task.sh, which adds a white GroundPlane to the BMW scene and disables transparency settings. Expected outputs are shadow_setup.blend (the modified project file) and shadow_composite.png (the rendered image). All metadata path claims (start_blend, expected_blend, expected_render, target_object, required_engine) are verified to match the actual script implementations.
